positive: A hyper-detailed, minimalist vector illustration design featuring a whimsical, stylized grouping of bioluminescent fireflies and glowing mushrooms within a delicate forest floor setting. The main elements should form a central, cohesive, and elegant cluster, suitable for a chest graphic print. Use strong, contrasting silhouettes (deep indigo/black outlines) against a subtle gradient background of forest emerald and lavender. Style should be modern kawaii meets celestial botanicals, utilizing clean lines, geometric shapes, and high contrast points of light. Composition must be centrally balanced and visually appealing when scaled down, ensuring all elements are distinct and legible. Flat design principles mixed with ethereal glow effects. Trending on ArtStation, highly printable, no visible text.
